Class BlueSentinel

java.lang.Object
NonGui.BaseEntity.Objective
NonGui.ListOfObjective.BlueSentinel
public class BlueSentinel extends Objective
Represents the "Blue Sentinel" Objective Card.

The Crest of Insight grants you ultimate clarity and magical prowess. Requirement: Requires at least 1 Hero and 1 Support. Prize: Each time you roll for a Hero card's effect, +1 to your roll. Punishment: DISCARD 2 cards.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    BlueSentinel()
    Constructs a new Blue Sentinel objective with its requirements and penalties.
